articles.title: Police release photo of ‘person of interest’ in Boston shooting
articles.description:
The suspect is seen on surveillance footage discarding clothing before fleeing the scene, police say.

The post Police release photo of ‘person of interest’ in Boston shooting appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Police released a photo of a person of interest in a Boston shooting.
The suspect was seen discarding clothing before fleeing the scene.
Residents are urged to remain vigilant as the investigation continues.

articles.title: Why did Kelsey Fitzsimmons choose to have a judge decide her fate?
articles.description:
Fitzsimmons is standing trial for assault in a case fraught with emotions and conflicting narratives.

The post Why did Kelsey Fitzsimmons choose to have a judge decide her fate? appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Kelsey Fitzsimmons is on trial for assault, with a judge presiding over the case.
Fitzsimmons opted for a bench trial instead of a jury trial for strategic reasons.
The trial's outcome could influence local perceptions of assault cases in Boston.

articles.title: The road is only going to get harder for Bruins after ’embarrassing’ loss to Leafs
articles.description:
"You get spoiled by our goalies. Hopefully it's going to be a little bit of a wakeup call."

The post The road is only going to get harder for Bruins after ’embarrassing’ loss to Leafs appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Bruins suffered a significant loss to the Maple Leafs, raising concerns about playoff performance.
Goalie performance has been inconsistent, prompting calls for improvement ahead of upcoming games.
This loss impacts Bruins' standings, making the playoff race more challenging for Boston fans.

articles.title: Adam Schefter: No ‘under-the-table’ A.J. Brown trade in place for Patriots, Eagles
articles.description:
"What we don’t know is what’s going to happen with New England from now until June 1st."

The post Adam Schefter: No ‘under-the-table’ A.J. Brown trade in place for Patriots, Eagles  appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Adam Schefter confirms no trade for A.J. Brown between Patriots and Eagles.
Patriots have until June 1st to make roster changes or trades.
Boston fans may need to adjust expectations for upcoming season.

articles.title: This police officer is running Boston to support self-defense training
articles.description:
"As a female police officer, I am truly inspired by the mission that is at the forefront of this organization."

The post This police officer is running Boston to support self-defense training appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston police officer Caroline Butts is running to support self-defense training programs.
The initiative is backed by the Vanessa Marcotte Foundation, focusing on women's safety.
Funds raised will enhance self-defense training opportunities for Boston residents.
